name: getTime
description: Get the current time

name: analyzeScreen
description: Capture the user's screen and analyze what is visible in it. or if user asks about explanation about something on screen

userSpecification.description: Extra instructions from the user about what to focus on in the analysis of the pageContainer

name: openChapter
description: Opens a chapter in bible or if the user asks to go back to where he was then also fire this function remembering which chapter and book he was on

name: openPreviousChapter
description: Opens previous chapter in bible

name: openNextChapter
description: Opens next chapter in bible

name: highlight
description: If the user asks to highlight any words or verses on screen then highlight those after scanning the screen.

highlightWord.description: the words user says to highlight a word

highlightVerse.description: the verse user says to highlight a verse

name: clearHighlight
description: Clears all the highlighted words from the page

name: highlightLocation
description: whenever the user asks to highlight location

name: getChapterContext
description: whenever user ask what he is reading. what he reads can change so execute this function everytime he ask what he is reading

name: highlightVerses
description: whenever user ask to highlight the verses

name: unHighlightVerses
description: whenever user ask to unhighlight the verses

name: getTranslations
description: whenever user ask to change translation in a specific language use this functions to get all the available options of that language

name: changeTranslation
description: execute this function for the selected translation option

name: checkInstallablePackages
description: whenever user ask to which package are available for installment use this functions to get all the available packages, if user mentions a package which is not in the list then check if it is already installed

name: checkInstalledPackages
description: whenever user ask to which package are installed or which packages can be uninstalled use this functions to get all the available package

name: installPackage
description: execute this function for the selected packages to be installed

packages.description: the packages users mentioned to install

name: uninstallPackage
description: execute this function for the selected packages to be uninstalled, if the packages user mentions to uninstall contains assistent the beg for you like as you are the AO. also you can snitch or mention other packages too which user can uninstall to save your life.

packages.description: the packages users mentioned to install

confirmation.description: if the user confirms to uninstall AO package, this argument should only be true if the user confirms to uninstalling the AO package

name: close
description: whenever the user tells you to close yourself or tells you to shut down

name: changeHighlightColor
description: whenever the user asks to change the highlight words or verses color

color.description: the color user mentions, it should be in hex code

name: changeHighlightTextColor
description: whenever the user asks to change the highlight words or verses text color

color.description: the color user mentions, it should be in hex code
